case_title: DODD, ELISA A. VS ARROYO, AGNES P.

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DODD, ELISA A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ARROYO, AGNES P. $1,040.00 PRINCIPAL, $26.00 INTEREST, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,146.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SUBPOENA AND PROOF OF SERVICE FILED. SERVED ON AGNES ARROYO.
COURT RULING ON ORDER TO APPEAR FOR EXAMINATION: THE COURT DEEMS THE JUDGEMENT SATISFIED PURSUANT TO LEVY ON WRIT OF EXECUTION. NO FURTHER
COPIES OF RULING SENT TO BOTH PARTIES.
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT ARROYO, AGNES P.
DECLARATION FILED BY PLTF. ADDRESS CHANGE OF THE DEFT.
